Class-Rogue 20 — Female Human Rogue: 20
Strength: 13 (+1) Dexterity: 15 (+2) Constitution: 16 (+3) Intelligence: 14 (+2) Wisdom: 13 (+1) Charisma: 14 (+2)
Background: Acolyte Alignment: Lawful Neutral Deity: None
Ability Boosts: Charisma: 2; Dexterity: 1; Intelligence: 1; Strength: 3; Wisdom: 1 Experience: 496140/1000000 Level: 20 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 195/390
Ability Notes:
Ability Score Improvement: Ability Boost (Choose 2 from any)
Boon Of Dimensional Travel: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from any)
Durable: +1 Constitution
Grappler: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Strength, Dexterity)
Mage Slayer: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Strength, Dexterity)
Ability Boosts: 8 to distribute
Second-Story Work: Has a 30' climb Speed
Stroke Of Luck: Can change a failed ability check roll to a 20 once per short rest
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +6
Feat Count: Epic Boon: 1; General: 6; Origin: 1 Selectable Feature Count: Rogue (Rogue Subclass)
Feats: Ability Score Improvement; Alert; Boon Of Dimensional Travel; Durable; Grappler; Mage Slayer; Savage Attacker; Skilled Human Features: Resourceful; Skillful; Versatile Rogue Features: Arcane Trickster; Armor Training (Light); Assassin's Tools; Assassin; Assassinate; Cunning Action; Cunning Strike; Death Strike; Devious Strikes; Elusive; Envenom Weapons; Epic Boon; Evasion; Expertise; Fast Hands; Improved Cunning Strike; Infiltration Expertise; Mage Hand Legerdemain; Magical Ambush; Psi-Bolstered Knack; Psionic Power (Soulknife); Psychic Blades; Psychic Veil; Psychic Whispers; Reliable Talent; Rend Mind; Rogue Subclass; Save Proficiency (Dexterity; Intelligence); Second-Story Work; Skill Proficiency (Choose 4 from Acrobatics, Athletics, Deception, Insight, Intimidation, Investigation, Perception, Persuasion, Sleight Of Hand, Stealth); Slippery Mind; Sneak Attack; Soul Blades; Soulknife; Spell Thief; Spellcasting; Steady Aim; Stroke Of Luck; Supreme Sneak; Thief's Reflexes; Thief; Thieves' Cant; Tool Proficiency (Thieves' Tools); Uncanny Dodge; Use Magic Device; Versatile Trickster; Weapon Mastery; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Finesse Weapons; Light Weapons) Acolyte Features: Ability Boost (Choose 3 from Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma); Magic Initiate (Cleric); Skill Proficiency (Insight; Religion); Tool Proficiency (Calligrapher's Supplies)
Feature Notes:
Epic Boon: +1 Epic Boon Feat
Rogue Subclass: 1 selection
Soul Blades: Has the Homing Strikes and Psychic Teleportation features
Versatile: +1 Origin Feat
Resourceful: Gains Heroic Inspiration at the end of a long rest
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +8 Insight: (wis) +13 Performance: (cha) +8
Animal Handling: (wis) +1 Intimidation: (cha) +2 Persuasion: (cha) +2
Arcana: (int) +14 Investigation: (int) +2 Religion: (int) +8
Athletics: (str) +1 Medicine: (wis) +1 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +8
Deception: (cha) +14 Nature: (int) +2 Stealth: (dex) +14
History: (int) +2 Perception: (wis) +1 Survival: (wis) +1
Skill Proficiency: Acrobatics; Arcana; Deception; Insight; Performance; Religion; Sleight Of Hand; Stealth
Expertise: Arcana; Deception; Insight; Stealth
Tool Proficiency: Calligrapher's Supplies: (dex); Disguise Kit: (cha); Poisoner's Kit: (int); Thieves' Tools: (dex)
Languages: Celestial; Common; Deep Speech; Infernal; Thieves' Cant
Skill Notes:
Assassin's Tools: Tool Proficiency (Disguise Kit; Poisoner's Kit)
Expertise: Has expertise in 4 chosen proficient skills
Skilled: Skill Proficiency or Tool Proficiency (Choose 3 from any)
Skillful: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)
Thieves'Cant: Language (Thieves' Cant; Choose 1 from any)
Infiltration Expertise: Can mimic another's speech and handwriting after an hour's study
Psi-Bolstered Knack: Can add a psionic energy die roll to a failed proficient skill or tool check, spending the die only if the modified check succeeds
Psychic Whispers: Can establish telepathic communication within 1 mile with 6 visible creatures for 1d12 hr once per long rest; can expend psionic energy dice for additional uses
Reliable Talent: Scores at least a 10 on proficient skill and tool check rolls
Second-Story Work: +2' running jump distance
Use Magic Device: Has a 1 in 6 chance of using a magic item without expending a charge and can attune 4 magic items, use cantrip and level 1 spell scrolls reliably, and use a higher-level spell scroll with a successful DC 10 + spell level Arcana check
Combat
Hit Points: 124 Initiative: +8 Armor Class: 13
Armor Training: Light Weapon Proficiency: Finesse Weapons; Light Weapons; Simple Weapons
Armor: Leather Shield: None Weapons: Greatclub (+7 1d8+1 B; Push); Light Crossbow (+8 1d8+2 P R80/320; Slow); Light Hammer (+7 1d4+1 B R20/60; Nick); Unarmed Strike (+7 1+1 B)
Combat Notes:
Alert: +6 Initiative
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +60
Devious Strikes: Has increased Cunning Strike effects
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +2
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +2
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +2
Improved Cunning Strike: Has increased Cunning Strike effects
Infiltration Expertise: Has increased Steady Aim effects
Strength Attack Adjustment: +1
Strength Damage Adjustment: +1
Alert: Can swap initiatives with a willing ally
Assassinate: Has advantage on initiative and on attacks before the target's first turn, and a successful Sneak Attack during the first rd inflicts +20 HP
Boon Of Dimensional Travel: Can teleport 30' after attacking or casting
Cunning Action: Can use a bonus action to Dash, Disengage, or Hide
Cunning Strike: Can reduce Sneak Attack damage to inflict 2 choices of: limitation to 1 action or move on the target's next turn (save Constitution negates) (reduces damage by 2d6 HP), unconsciousness (save Constitution negates; additional saves each rd end) for 1 min (reduces damage by 6d6 HP), blindness until the end of the target's next turn (save Dexterity negates) (reduces damage by 3d6), poisoned (save Constitution negates; additional saves each rd end) for 1 min (reduces damage by 1d6 HP), prone (save Dexterity negates; Huge and larger targets are unaffected) (reduces damage by 1d6 HP), or to move 15' after attacking without provoking opportunity attacks (reduces damage by 1d6 HP)
Death Strike: Successful Sneak Attack during the first rd inflicts double damage (save DC 16 Constitution negates)
Durable: Can use a bonus action to regain hit points from a Hit Die roll
Elusive: Attacks on self never have advantage
Envenom Weapons: Cunning Strikes that inflict poisoned also inflict 2d6 HP poison, ignoring resistance, on a failed save
Fast Hands: Can use a bonus action to disarm a trap, open a lock, pick a pocket, or take a Utilize action
Grappler: Can both Damage and Grapple with an unarmed strike once per turn, has advantage on attacks on a grappled foe, and can move at full speed with a grappled foe of Medium size or smaller
Homing Strikes: Can add 1d12 to a failed Psychic Blade attack, spending a psionic energy die if the sum is enough to hit
Mage Slayer: Attacks inflict disadvantage on concentration to maintain a spell
Psionic Power (Soulknife): Can use 12 d12 psionic energy dice per long rest; regains 1 die after a short rest
Psychic Blades: Can use a free hand to attack with a R60' magic psychic blade, inflicting 1d6+2 HP psychic; if both hands are free, can use a bonus action for a second blade attack that inflicts 1d4+2
Psychic Teleportation: Can spend 1 psionic energy die and use a bonus action to teleport 1d12x10'
Rend Mind: Can inflict stunned (save DC 16 Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for 1 min with a Psychic Blade Sneak Attack once per long rest; can expend 3 psionic energy dice per additional use
Savage Attacker: Can take the better of 2 damage rolls once per turn
Sneak Attack: Once per turn, inflicts +10d6 HP on an attack using a finesse or ranged weapon with advantage or on a foe threatened by another adjacent creature
Steady Aim: Can use a bonus action to gain advantage on the next attack in the same turn
Supreme Sneak: Can use Cunning Strike to attack while invisible from hiding without becoming visible; reduces the damage by 1d6 HP
Thief's Reflexes: Can take an second turn during the first combat rd at initiative - 10
Uncanny Dodge: Can use a reaction to reduce the damage taken from a seen attacker by half
Versatile Trickster: Can extend the trip action of Cunning Strike to affect another creature within 5' of a Mage Hand
Weapon Mastery: Can use the mastery properties of 2 chosen kinds of proficient weapons
Save Proficiency: Charisma; Dexterity; Intelligence; Wisdom
Save: Charisma: +8; Constitution: +3; Dexterity: +8; Intelligence: +8; Strength: +1; Wisdom: +7
Save Notes:
Slippery Mind: Save Proficiency (Charisma; Wisdom)
Durable: Has advantage on death saves
Evasion: Successful Dexterity saves yield no damage instead of half, and failures yield half damage
Mage Slayer: Can turn a failed Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma save into a success once per short rest
Magic
Spells Known/Prepared: C0: 2; C: 1; W0: 3; W: 13 Spell Slots: W1: 4; W2: 3; W3: 3; W4: 1 Attack: C: +7; Rogue: +8; W: +8 Spell DC: C: 15; Rogue: 16; W: 16
Spells: Mage Hand (Rogue0 [Mage Hand Legerdemain] Conj): R30' Spectral hand performs minor tasks, moving up to 10 lb, for 1 min
Magic Notes:
Mage Hand Legerdemain: Can use a bonus action with an invisible Mage Hand to make Sleight Of Hand checks
Magic Initiate (Cleric): Knows 2 Cleric cantrips and can cast a chosen C1 spell without expending a spell slot once per long rest
Magical Ambush: Casting a spell while invisible inflicts disadvantage on the target's initial save
Psychic Veil: Can become invisible for 1 hr once per long rest; inflicting damage or forcing a saving throw ends; can expend psionic energy dice for additional uses
Spell Thief: Can negate the effects of a spell cast on self, prevent the original caster from using that spell for 8 hr, and use spell slots to cast it during that time (save DC 16 negates) once per long rest
Spellcasting: Can cast spells from the Wizard spell list and cast spells marked with [R] using a ritual; regains expended spell slots after a long rest
Notes
Validation Errors: Selectable Feature Allocation: 1 available vs. 4 allocated
